metadata.description: Computes k-WL (k=1,2,3) certificates for molecular graphs, measures collision rates and conditional variance (Bayes error floor), and assigns each (dataset, property) pair to a 2×2 typology quadrant.

examples.input: Dataset: BBBP | Property: p_np | N molecules: 2039 | Total variance: 0.1797 | Std: 0.4239
examples.output:
Typology: 3D-geometry-limited
k=1: collision_rate=0.1429, variance_floor=0.0202
k=2: collision_rate=0.1489, variance_floor=0.0182
k=3: collision_rate=0.1505, variance_floor=0.0182
Reasoning: High k=1 ...

examples.input: Dataset: ESOL | Property: measured log solubility in mols per litre | N molecules: 1128 | Total variance: 4.3912 | Std: 2.0955
examples.output:
Typology: 3D-geometry-limited
k=1: collision_rate=0.0916, variance_floor=0.0043
k=2: collision_rate=0.0000, variance_floor=0.0002
k=3: collision_rate=0.0000, variance_floor=0.0001
Reasoning: High k=1 ...
examples.metadata_property: measured log solubility in mols per litre

examples.input: Dataset: FreeSolv | Property: expt | N molecules: 642 | Total variance: 14.7827 | Std: 3.8448
examples.output:
Typology: WL-bottlenecked
k=1: collision_rate=0.0690, variance_floor=0.0057
k=2: collision_rate=0.0000, variance_floor=0.0000
k=3: collision_rate=0.0000, variance_floor=0.0000
Reasoning: High k=1 coll...
